metadata.title: Inline spoilers
metadata.description: Adds Discord-like syntax for inline spoilers.

regex.target: .setName("在编辑器视图中隐藏剧透 (实验性功能)")

regex.source: .setDesc("Always show all inline spoilers, regardless of whether they are clicked or not.")
regex.target: .setDesc("始终显示所有内联剧透，无论是否被点击。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Hide spoilers in the editor until your cursor is on the same line as the spoiler.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在编辑器中隐藏剧透，直到光标移动到与剧透同一行时才显示。")
